name: Dr Panpan Yang
title: Lecturer, Arts and Visual Cultures of Modern China
expertise_topics: Panpan Yang's research explores the possibilities of a minor discourse to deterritorialise the terrains of both art history and screen studies. Her areas of academic interests include
the arts and visual cultures of China and the Sinophone world
films in East and Southeast Asia
interactions between Chinese and African arts
research_interests: Panpan Yang's research explores the possibilities of a minor discourse to deterritorialise the terrains of both art history and screen studies. Her areas of academic interests include; the arts and visual cultures of China and the Sinophone world; contemporary art; films in East and Southeast Asia; animation; digital arts; AI and art practices; new media; art theory and criticism; cultural flows; interactions between Chinese and African arts; space; place; and landscape; medium and materiality; intermediality; gender and genre; Chinese literature; ethnic minorities in China; Teochew opera; cinema; and material cultures
